title: Label in Name
description: For user interface components with labels that include text or images of text , the name contains the text that is presented visually. A best practice is to have the text of the label at the start of the name.

failures.title: Ensure elements in the focus order have a role appropriate for interactive content Minor cat.keyboard, best-practice, RGAAv4, RGAA-12.8.1, experimental failure hidden-content Inform users about hidden content. Minor cat.structure, best-practice, experimental, review-item failure, needs review label-content-name-mismatch Ensure that elements labelled through their content must have their visible text as part of their accessible name Serious cat.semantics, wcag21a, wcag253, EN-301-549, EN-9.2.5.3, RGAAv4, RGAA-6.1.5, experimental failure 2ee8b8
